name: HTTP Protocol Anomalies
description: Detects HTTP protocol violations, request smuggling attempts, header injection, and other anomalies that indicate malicious or malformed requests. Helps prevent desync attacks and protocol-level exploits.
author: Ghostwire Proxy

rules.name: HTTP Request Smuggling — CL.TE
rules.description: Detects requests with both Content-Length and Transfer-Encoding headers (request smuggling).

rules.name: HTTP Header Injection
rules.description: Detects CRLF injection attempts to inject HTTP headers.

rules.name: Invalid HTTP Methods
rules.description: Blocks uncommon HTTP methods often used in attacks or fingerprinting.

rules.name: HTTP Method Override
rules.description: Logs HTTP method override headers which may bypass access controls.

rules.name: Host Header Injection
rules.description: Detects Host header manipulation used for cache poisoning or SSRF.

rules.name: Chunked Encoding Anomaly
rules.description: Detects malformed or multiple Transfer-Encoding values used in smuggling.

rules.name: Oversized Headers
rules.description: Detects abnormally large header values that may indicate buffer overflow attempts.

rules.name: Unicode Encoding Evasion
rules.description: Detects Unicode encoding used to evade WAF pattern matching.
